    checkForValidUserName(String) - Static method in class guiTools.EmailRecognizer
    Checks whether the given input matches the expected pattern.
    checkForValidUserName(String) - Static method in class guiTools.UserNameRecognizer
    Checks whether the given username is valid.

    Clears all replies from storage.

    Clears the temporary-password flag for a user.

    Closes the database connection.
    connectToDatabase() - Method in class database.Database
    Opens the database connection and creates the required tables.
